mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, description, completed, due_datetime AS dueDatetime, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, description, completed, due_datetime AS dueDatetime, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( user_id, title, description, due_datetime ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{dueDatetime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, completed = #{completed}, due_datetime = #{dueDatetime} WHERE id = #{id}
